aether_nebula_flow.name: AETHER // NEBULA FLOW
aether_nebula_flow.author: silentoplayz (G30)
aether_nebula_flow.description: Atmospheric translucent UI with gaseous nebula Canvas FX and holographic shimmer accents. Cool blue tones with frosted glass panels.

amber.name: Amber
amber.author: silentoplayz (G30)
amber.description: Warm golden-olive palette reminiscent of polished amber, with a subtle gradient glow.

amber_command_1979.name: Amber Command: 1979
amber_command_1979.author: silentoplayz (G30)
amber_command_1979.description: Vintage CRT terminal aesthetic with amber monochrome tones, scan-line flicker effects, and Geometric Mainframe Canvas FX.

amethyst.name: Amethyst
amethyst.author: silentoplayz (G30)
amethyst.description: Vibrant purple tones inspired by amethyst crystals, with a deep violet gradient.

apollo_analogue_futurism.name: Apollo // Analogue Futurism
apollo_analogue_futurism.author: silentoplayz (G30)
apollo_analogue_futurism.description: NASA-era analogue hardware interface with industrial chassis textures, Vector Telemetry Canvas FX, and muted steel-blue tones.

astral_projection.name: Astral Projection
astral_projection.author: silentoplayz (G30)
astral_projection.description: Deep space glassmorphism with ethereal violet-blue tones, Hyperspace Warp Drive Canvas FX, and luminous translucent panels.

bio_digital_synthesis.name: Bio-Digital Synthesis
bio_digital_synthesis.author: silentoplayz (G30)
bio_digital_synthesis.description: Living bio-organic UI with pulsing borders, Synaptic Network Canvas FX, and vibrant magenta-purple neural tones.

bioluminescence.name: Bioluminescence
bioluminescence.author: silentoplayz (G30)
bioluminescence.description: Deep ocean bioluminescent aesthetic with glowing cyan accents, jellyfish-inspired Canvas FX, and frosted glass panels.

blue_lightning.name: Blue Lightning
blue_lightning.author: silentoplayz (G30)
blue_lightning.description: Electric aurora borealis gradients with Blue Lightning Twinkle Canvas FX and vibrant cerulean-teal tones.

emerald.name: Emerald
emerald.author: silentoplayz (G30)
emerald.description: Rich green hues evoking a dense, jewel-toned forest with matching gradient.

entropy_data_storm.name: ENTROPY // DATA-STORM
entropy_data_storm.author: silentoplayz (G30)
entropy_data_storm.description: Industrial containment UI with corroded amber warning tones, Bit-Stream Corruption Canvas FX, and JetBrains Mono typography.

four_seasons_desynced.name: Four Seasons (Desynced)
four_seasons_desynced.author: silentoplayz (G30)
four_seasons_desynced.description: Nature-inspired seasonal palette with emerald canopy tones, Fireflies Canvas FX, and soft rounded corners.

kinetic_thermal_plasma_core.name: Kinetic Thermal // Plasma Core
kinetic_thermal_plasma_core.author: silentoplayz (G30)
kinetic_thermal_plasma_core.description: Fusion reactor control interface with industrial plating, Plasma Arc Discharge Canvas FX, and cool blue containment tones.

lumina_aurora.name: LUMINA // AURORA
lumina_aurora.author: silentoplayz (G30)
lumina_aurora.description: Premium glassmorphism with layered frosted panels, Fluid Aurora Borealis Canvas FX, and deep indigo-violet tones.

matrix_rain.name: Matrix Rain
matrix_rain.author: silentoplayz (G30)
matrix_rain.description: Hacker terminal aesthetic with phosphor-green grid lines, Matrix code rain Canvas FX, and monochrome dark palette.

midnight.name: Midnight
midnight.author: silentoplayz (G30)
midnight.description: Deep indigo tones with a dark linear gradient backdrop. A refined nocturnal palette.

neo_tactical_archive_01.name: NEO-TACTICAL // ARCHIVE 01
neo_tactical_archive_01.author: silentoplayz (G30)
neo_tactical_archive_01.description: Military console interface with Lidar Topographical Scan Canvas FX, monospace typography, and stealth blue-gray tones.

neon_overdrive.name: Neon Overdrive
neon_overdrive.author: silentoplayz (G30)
neon_overdrive.description: High-octane cyberpunk UI with intense neon magenta and electric blue accents, glitch-styled animations, and Neon Pulse Canvas FX on a deep midnight backdrop.

obsidian.name: Obsidian
obsidian.author: silentoplayz (G30)
obsidian.description: Pure achromatic darkness with a subtle charcoal-to-navy gradient.

pink_hues.name: Pink Hues
pink_hues.author: silentoplayz (G30)
pink_hues.description: Soft pink and rose color palette with warm pastel accents, gentle floating bokeh Canvas FX, and full color overrides.

project_singularity.name: Project Singularity
project_singularity.author: silentoplayz (G30)
project_singularity.description: Void interface with gravitational distortion effects, Accretion Canvas FX, and deep violet-black tones with phase-shift animations.

retro_terminal_crt.name: Retro Terminal (CRT)
retro_terminal_crt.author: silentoplayz (G30)
retro_terminal_crt.description: Classic green phosphor CRT terminal with VT323 font, scan-line overlay, Matrix code Canvas FX, and authentic retro glow.

rose_pine.name: Rosé Pine
rose_pine.author: silentoplayz (G30)
rose_pine.description: Adaptation of the Rosé Pine color scheme with muted lavender, rose, and pine tones, firefly constellation Canvas FX, and full color overrides.

ruby.name: Ruby
ruby.author: silentoplayz (G30)
ruby.description: Deep crimson and rose tones with a rich red gradient backdrop.

sapphire.name: Sapphire
sapphire.author: silentoplayz (G30)
sapphire.description: Cool blue tones reminiscent of a deep sapphire, with a matching ocean-depth gradient.

solar_flare.name: Solar Flare
solar_flare.author: silentoplayz (G30)
solar_flare.description: Luxury golden UI with warm amber accents, Solar Wind Embers Canvas FX, and rich copper-toned glassmorphism.

sovereign.name: Sovereign
sovereign.author: silentoplayz (G30)
sovereign.description: Architectural material design with Prismatic Caustics Canvas FX, premium glassmorphism panels, and deep navy-indigo tones.

synthwave_1984.name: Synthwave 1984
synthwave_1984.author: silentoplayz (G30)
synthwave_1984.description: Retro-futuristic synthwave aesthetic with neon magenta glow, Perspective Grid Canvas FX, and chrome-styled accents.

the_cyanotype.name: The Cyanotype
the_cyanotype.author: silentoplayz (G30)
the_cyanotype.description: Blueprint-inspired design with architectural grid overlay, deep navy tones, and technical drawing aesthetics. CSS-only — no Canvas FX.

topaz.name: Topaz
topaz.author: silentoplayz (G30)
topaz.description: Warm bronze and sienna tones with an earthy gradient backdrop.

toxic_nebula_smog_core.name: Toxic Nebula // Smog-Core
toxic_nebula_smog_core.author: silentoplayz (G30)
toxic_nebula_smog_core.description: Hazardous atmosphere UI with corrosive green accents, Smog particle Canvas FX, and toxic purple-violet tones with liquid pulse animations.

wasteland_uplink_amber.name: Wasteland Uplink (Amber)
wasteland_uplink_amber.author: silentoplayz (G30)
wasteland_uplink_amber.description: Post-apocalyptic terminal with Radiation Dust Canvas FX, VT323 monospace font, amber phosphor glow, and weathered UI elements.

windows_hotdog_stand.name: Windows Hotdog Stand
windows_hotdog_stand.author: silentoplayz (G30)
windows_hotdog_stand.description: Faithful recreation of the infamous Windows 3.1 Hot Dog Stand color scheme with retro pixel rain Canvas FX.
